name: Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, milk, and salt in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until it reaches the hard ball stage (235°F/114°C on an instant-read thermometer).
2. Remove from heat and stir in butter, vanilla, and peanut butter until well combined.
3. Pour mixture into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan.
4. Let cool completely before cutting into squares.
